title: Aarhus Heavy Rain
lead: Aarhus is experiencing extreme heavy rain with a Z-Score of -3.06. This event has been categorized as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain in Aarhus is expected to continue, causing disruptions to daily life. 
 The high humidity of 92% and moderate wind speed of 11.5 km/h will exacerbate the situation. 
 The city's infrastructure may be severely tested, with potential flooding and power outages.
conclusion: All necessary precautions should be taken immediately to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
